identity.fantasy: Become Firehouse 07's hose hero and save the station before each alarm zone is overwhelmed.
identity.playerVerb: Aim a continuous hose stream with your arm or pointer and hold steady pressure on each flame.
identity.targetMetaphor: Characterful station fires that flare, sputter under water, steam, and extinguish into cool smoke.

beats.purpose: Learn the hose by suppressing three forgiving garage-door fires.
Raise the aim and pressure demands across four upper-window fires.
Resolve the rescue with five smaller rooftop fires and the tightest holds.

themedEntities: firefighter helmet and coat camera costume
reactiveStates: extinguished with water impact and rising steam
presenter.continuousFeedback: The hose bends from the nozzle to the live aim point while water droplets, pressure, dwell rings, facial reactions, and audio respond continuously.
presenter.scoreAndResolution: A persistent score, fires-out tally, wave timer, pressure gauge, combo bonus, three alarm transitions, failure panel, and all-clear victory resolve the mission.
